raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is lagging in confronting mental health issues, with alarming spikes in suicide rates, substance abuse, and domestic violence since the pandemic began.",
    "In California, 47 out of 58 counties have no child/adolescent psychiatric hospital beds for children under age 12.",
    "Fewer than 70 child/adolescent psychiatric hospital beds are available statewide in California.",
    "Children’s Crisis Residential Programs are essential for providing urgent mental health services for children in crisis.",
    "The development of the 988 Suicide Lifeline system will direct calls made to the national hotline to appropriate crisis centers.",
    "Designated facilities are required to submit quarterly reports on involuntary confinements of persons with debilitating mental health disorders.",
    "Policymakers have relied on disjointed and incomplete tools, leading to inadequate assessment of investments in the mental health system.",
    "Data collection on involuntary confinements could provide continuity of care and track treatment effectiveness across the state."
  ]
}
```
